nasb.text: These are their genealogies: the firstborn of Ishmael was Nebaioth, then Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,

esv.text: These are their genealogies: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebaioth, and Kedar, Adbeel, Mibsam,

cnv.text: 以下是他們的後代：以實瑪利的長子是尼拜約，他其餘的兒子是基達、押德別、米比衫、

ccb.text: 以下是他们的后代： 以实玛利的长子是尼拜约，其余的儿子是基达、押德别、米比衫、
